query: Cryptocurrency catalysts week of June 21-28 2026 upcoming events ETH BTC BNB XRP
answer: The structured research output has been delivered. The report covers all major catalysts for BTC, ETH, BNB, and XRP during the June 21–28, 2026 window, with live price data from CoinGecko and news sourced from the Ethereum Foundation blog, Decrypt, Ripple Insights, BNB Chain blog, The Defiant, and Blockworks.

sources.title: CoinGecko Simple Price API (BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP)
Ethereum Foundation Blog — Protocol Cluster Updates May 2026 & Soldogn Interop Recap
sources.snippet: Glamsterdam upgrade in final devnet phase; ePBS stabilized; EIP-8037 finalized; 200M gas limit floor targeted; Hegota (FOCIL, native AA) groundwork laid

key_facts: CME and Deribit quarterly (Q2) options and futures expiry falls on Friday, June 26, 2026 — the last Friday of the month — expected to generate elevated volatility for BTC and ETH.

Ethereum's next major upgrade is named 'Glamsterdam' (not Pectra/Fulu/Osaka) and was in final devnet hardening phase as of mid-May 2026, with ePBS stabilized, EIP-8037 finalized, and a 200M gas limit floor targeted post-upgrade. No mainnet date announced yet.
New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh held his first FOMC meeting June 17-18, 2026, delivering hawkish messaging that triggered a crypto selloff; BTC fell to ~$62.6K.
BTC is trading at $62,628, down 50.3% from its all-time high of $126,080 set October 6, 2025. ETH at $1,693.90 is down 65.8% from its ATH of $4,946 set August 24, 2025.
Spot XRP ETFs have launched in the U.S.; Goldman Sachs holds $153.8M in XRP ETF shares; 30 major institutions including Millennium and Citadel hold XRP ETF exposure.

BNB Chain shipped the Osaka/Mendel hard fork in April 2026 with BEP-648, achieving ~0.65 second block finality (70x improvement from 2022). bStocks (tokenized U.S. securities) are now live as BEP-20 tokens.
Ethereum Foundation Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang departed, continuing a leadership exodus at the EF (reported June 18, 2026).
EU's MiCA transition period end is looming, squeezing European crypto firms that lack compliance.
Illinois is set to begin taxing crypto transactions, described as the 'most punitive' crypto tax in the U.S.
CME announced plans to sue the CFTC over Bitcoin perpetual futures approval (June 18, 2026).
XRPL daily transactions hit 3 million on March 15, 2026, a threefold increase from mid-2025 averages.
The next Ethereum upgrade after Glamsterdam is 'Hegota', with FOCIL prototypes functional and native account abstraction scoped.
Consensus Miami 2026 (CoinDesk) already occurred May 5-7; no major crypto conferences confirmed for June 21-28 specifically.
Jerome Powell (former Fed Chair) supported new Fed stablecoin policies, but current Chair Warsh abstained.
